subcodes.first_line: O servant of the all-glorious Beauty! Your letters have arrived and their contents were noted, but what this servant wishes for your honor is [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده جمال ابهی تحریرات واصل و مضمون مفهوم ولی آنچه که این عبد خیر آنجنابست
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @suffering and imprisonment, @service to others; to the Cause of God
